name: Breakfast Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the mushrooms and zucchini in a nonstick skillet until just cooked through.
2. Add the green onions and continue to cook for a minute or two.
3. Pour in the liquid egg mixture and cook until nearly set.
4. Stir in the cottage cheese and heat through, mixing well.
5. Fill tortillas with the filling, roll up tightly, and serve.
